rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §31.025 governs an instructional material internet website and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: The agency shall develop and maintain an instructional material Internet website to assist school districts in locating and selecting instructional material.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional materials statute.
